occupation.evidence: maine job quit kiya tha abhi recently job join kiya hai

temperature.evidence: Abhi toh hamara budget hai nahi Shalini ji. In future agar hota hai toh zaroor sochenge. Theek hai?

objections.quote: Abhi toh hamara budget hai nahi Shalini ji.
maine bataya tha unko. Aapke RM se bhi baat hui thi meri.

customer_pain_points: no investment budget due to recent unemployment

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: abhi toh mere paas investment ke paise hain nahi

decision_maker_status.evidence: Aap thoda aap hume finance kar dijiye hum kar lenge.

agent_promises: 35% ki income milna start ho jaati hai first year se hi aur yeh income aapko whole life tak milti rehti hai

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has no current budget and explicitly requested not to be contacted for promotional offers.

approachability.reasoning: Customer explicitly stated they have no budget due to recent job transition and requested not to be called for promotional offers.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced herself as calling from HDFC regarding a new plan, and the customer asked for full information.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was polite but firm in declining due to financial constraints and previous negative experiences with repeated calls.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer explained they recently rejoined a job after being unemployed for 6-7 months and requested the agent to stop calling.
call_narrative.ending: Agent attempted to ask for location after the customer had already declined and ended the conversation.

key_quotes: Abhi toh hamara budget hai nahi Shalini ji.
Aap thoda aap hume finance kar dijiye hum kar lenge.
maine job quit kiya tha abhi recently job join kiya hai toh abhi toh mere paas investment ke paise hain nahi.
